title: Tmag_Polarity Property
description: Sets or returns for resultant torque whether the force trigger is activated or inactivated when values correspond to or do not correspond with threshold values.
notes: Tmag_Polarity returns the status of or sets whether the force trigger is triggered by the value of the resultant torque being either within the thresholds or outside of the thresholds.
see_also:
Applies To

Force Control

Force Trigger
examples:
Function SettingPolarity FSet FT1.Enabled, False, False, False, False, False, False, False, True FSet FT1.Tmag_Polarity, FG_OUT FSet FT1.Tmag_Levels, 0, 3000 Trap 1, FT1 Call ForceError
Fend
